meetupBanner: Next AI Clinic · Tallinn - by invitation →

hero.p: A quiet AI practice in Tallinn - community events for entrepreneurs and AI practitioners, 1-on-1 training, and selective consulting. @ Undercover.

manifest.title: What this is. What it isn't.

principles.title: Practice, not pitches.
principles.body: Real problems, real implementations. No slides about 'transformation'.

principles.title: Off the record.
principles.body: What's said in the room stays in the room. No LinkedIn posts. No press.

principles.title: Practitioners, not influencers.
principles.body: We invite people who actually ship - not people who write threads about it.

formats.title: AI Clinic
formats.body: 8–12 people. A company brings a real problem. Practitioners work it for 90 minutes. Chatham House. No slides.

formats.title: Friday Demo
formats.body: Three 10-minute demos of things that work in production. Drinks after.

club.title: AI Clinic
club.sub: 8–12 people. A company brings a real problem. Practitioners work it for 90 minutes. Chatham House. No slides.

pillars.title: Practice, not theory
pillars.desc: We bring real cases people are wrestling with right now - not slideshows about what AI will do in 2030.

pillars.title: Off the record
pillars.desc: What's said in the room stays in the room. No press, no LinkedIn posts, no recordings.

pillars.title: Real practitioners
pillars.desc: Half the room ships AI in production every week. The other half is here to ask them anything.

steps.title: Talk
steps.desc: A 30-minute call. What are you actually trying to do? What have you tried? Where is it stuck?

steps.title: Map
steps.desc: I write up what I'd do, what I wouldn't, and what it costs. You decide if we keep going.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Implementation, training, or both. Working sessions with you or your team. Always on real workflows.

steps.title: Hand-off
steps.desc: You and your team own the result. Recordings, docs, and a month of follow-up included.

services.title: What I do
services.sub: Three ways we can work together.

funding.title: EIS grants for AI and automation
funding.sub: Estonia co-funds the work we already do. Active programmes for 2026.
funding.disclaimer: Terms change. Check eis.ee before applying. Baseline requirement: Estonian legal entity, 2-year average revenue ≥ €50,000.

grants.title: Off-the-shelf software adoption
grants.fit: Buying and integrating ready SaaS tools: CRM, assistants, agents, bookkeeping. The fastest measure — a good first step if you're starting out.

grants.title: Process automation
grants.fit: Custom builds: AI agents, back-office automation, data services. Most of the AI projects we actually deliver fit here.

grants.title: Digitalisation roadmap
grants.fit: A small grant for drafting a digital roadmap with a consultant. A clean entry point — easier to apply for the bigger measures afterwards.

grants.title: Applied research
grants.fit: For R&D projects: your own model, custom ML systems, research partner. Applications take prep — start 2–3 months before the deadline.

help.title: I can help you apply
help.body: Half the work is framing the AI project so it fits EIS criteria. Comes as part of consulting.

clients.title: Our clients
clients.sub: A few of the companies we've worked with.

cases.title: What this looks like in practice
cases.sub: A few engagements. Real problems, real numbers.

items.title: Steel Structures Factory
items.problem: Laser cutting machine ran disconnected from ERP. Operators re-entered every job manually — parts, quantities, cut times. Errors in production orders, delays in invoicing.
items.solution: Direct integration between the laser CNC controller and the ERP system. Job data flows automatically: cut plans in, actual production data back.

items.title: Forsta
items.problem: Analysts spent days assembling client reports from raw survey data. Each report followed a strict structure but was built by hand — copy-pasting, formatting, cross-referencing.
items.solution: Automated report generation engine that reads the data structure, applies the client's template, and outputs a finished report ready for review.

items.title: Riigihanked AI Assistant
items.problem: Public procurement tenders are 50–200 pages of legal and technical text. Reading, scoring, and preparing bid documents took days per tender.
items.solution: An AI-powered tool that analyses tender documents, scores fit against company profile, and generates the required bid documentation and compliance checklists.

roi.title: Rough math
roi.sub: What automating routine work might save you - back-of-envelope estimate.
roi.estimate: A rough estimate. Real numbers come out of a conversation.

about.title: Who's running this
items: Full-stack developer. Been shipping AI in production since GPT-3.
Built and integrated AI into real production systems - not demos.
Background in fintech and manufacturing. Boring industries that pay attention to ROI.
Russian, Estonian, English. Based in Tallinn.
cardItems: Every major technology - from writing to the internet - has changed not just the tools we use, but the role humans play in work and decision-making.
AI is the first technology that doesn't just execute commands - it participates in reasoning. That shifts the center of value: from owning information to knowing how to direct it.
Competitive advantage moves from those who know the answer to those who can ask the right question and judge the result.
The task today isn't to catch up with the technology - it's to redesign processes and skills around a new logic of work: 'human + AI'.

items.q: Can I attend events without being a member?
items.a: Friday Demo is open with RSVP. AI Clinic is by application - drop a line and we'll see if you fit a coming session.

items.q: What if I'm just starting with AI?
items.a: 1-on-1 training is the answer. We start from your real workflows, not 'what is AI'. No prerequisites except a real problem.

items.q: Do you do AI consulting for companies?
items.a: Yes - selectively. I take 3–4 engagements at a time so I can do them properly. If we're a fit, the first call is free and direct.
Hackathons, hype keynotes, 'AI strategy' decks for marketing, '10 prompts that will change your life' content. If your email mentions 'transformational journey', I won't reply.

contact.title: Tell me what's on your mind
contact.sub: I read everything. Reply within 24 hours.

form.name: Name *
form.sentSub: I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

cookie.text: This site uses cookies for analytics.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
sections.body: Undercover AI - AI practice room, personal training, and consulting. Run by Sergei Zahharenko. Part of Undercover, Tallinn, Estonia. Contact: acrashik@gmail.com

sections.title: 2. What data we collect
sections.body: Via contact form: name, email, company, task description. Via cookies (with consent): anonymous analytics.

sections.title: 3. How we use data
sections.body: Only to respond to your inquiry. We do not share with third parties or use for advertising.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis (GDPR)
sections.body: Processing based on consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) and legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

sections.title: 5. Retention
sections.body: Form data - no more than 2 years. Deletion on request at any time.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.body: Access, correction, deletion, portability, withdrawal of consent. Contact: acrashik@gmail.com

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.body: Used only after your explicit consent. Withdrawal - via banner or clearing cookies.

sections.title: 8. Supervisory authority
sections.body: Andmekaitse Inspektsioon (Estonian Data Protection Inspectorate): aki.ee
